[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a close-up of large black text on a white background.

The main subject is the block of stacked text filling most of the frame, with the letters clearly visible.

The setting appears to be a plain white background with no other visible objects or context; the lighting is uniform and the text is sharply contrasted in black.

Visual Details: The typography is bold, uppercase, and left-aligned, arranged in multiple lines: the first line reads “SORRY GES,” followed by “IDOLA,” then “KALIAN,” then “BARU,” and finally “NONGOL.” The text is the only visible element, and the camera framing is tightly cropped around the text.

Visible Text: “SORRY GES” “IDOLA” “KALIAN” “BARU” “NONGOL”

Practical Summary: The image is a text-only graphic with multiple lines of bold uppercase words. It presents the message as large black lettering on a white background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
